revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-4-310

The process of starting a three-phase motor with the primary winding initially connected as a star network, and then reconnected as a delta network for the normal running conditions.

{{IALAFooter}}
